description: The date for which the metrics are recorded.
Unique identifier for the Facebook Page.
Total number of times any content from your Page or about your Page entered a person's screen (includes paid, viral, and non-viral).
Number of impressions resulting from paid advertisements (e.g., boosted posts or ads).
Number of times content associated with your Page was shown because friends interacted with it (shares, likes, comments).
Number of organic impressions excluding viral reach.
Total number of actions (likes, comments, shares, clicks) on your Page's posts.
Number of new followers gained on the specific day.
Total cumulative number of followers of the Page up to that date.
Total number of Like reactions on Page posts.
Total number of Love reactions on Page posts.
Total number of Wow reactions on Page posts.
Total number of Haha reactions on Page posts.
Total number of Sad reactions on Page posts.
Total number of Angry reactions on Page posts.
Total number of all user actions (likes, shares, comments, clicks, etc.) on the Page.
Total number of users who have liked the Page (Page fans).
Number of new fans who liked the Page on that date.
Number of fans who unliked the Page on that date.
Total number of views of your Page, including profile, posts, and other tabs.
Total number of times Page videos were viewed (at least 3 seconds).
Number of paid video views from ads or promoted posts.
Number of organic video views (unpaid).
Views that were automatically played in users' feeds.
Views that started when users clicked to play the video.
Number of times videos were rewatched.
Number of times videos were watched for at least 30 seconds (or to completion for shorter videos).
30-second (or complete) paid video views.
30-second (or complete) organic video views.
30-second (or complete) autoplayed views.
30-second (or complete) click-to-play views.
Number of repeated 30-second (or complete) video views.
Total time (in milliseconds or seconds) that videos were watched.
Total impressions of Page posts (number of times posts entered users' screens).
Number of paid impressions for Page posts.
Number of viral impressions (caused by users' friends interacting).
Number of non-viral, organic impressions for Page posts.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row. Internal metadata, never expose to users.
